name: Oatmeal Cookies with Raisins and Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
2. Grease two 17x14 inch cookie sheets lightly.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and sugars with an electric mixer at medium-high speed until fluffy.
4. Reduce mixer speed to low, then add flour and oatmeal. Gradually increase the speed and beat until just blended.
5. Stir in raisins and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 1/2 inches apart onto prepared sheets.
7. Bake one sheet at a time for 17 minutes, or until the edges of cookies are lightly browned and tops look dry.
8. Let cook on the sheet with a wire rack for 5 minutes.
9. Transfer to a cooling rack to cool completely.
